subject: Meet Agent 4
content:
Hi canihaveyournu3, Agent 4 is here, built to keep you in the creative flow.
Try Agent 4 now
What’s new: 1. Design & build on an infinite canvas
Introducing a new infinite design canvas: draw, sketch, or mark up designs visually, and apply them directly to your app. 2. Build everything you need in one place Create mobile apps, websites, landing pages, decks, videos, and more. All in one project with shared context and design. No more context switching.
Note: creating multiple apps in one project is only supported for new projects. Support for existing projects is on the way.
Try these Pro plan features, included for a limited time in the Core plan,
upgrade now :  3. Do more at once with parallel agents
Build multiple features at the same time: login, database, design, and more. Then seamlessly apply them all into your main app.  4. Focus on the vision while Agent handles the execution You and your team can submit requests in any order, even simultaneously, and Agent 4 sequences and executes them all.
Register for our livestreams
starting Noon PDT or visit
replit.com/agent4
today to learn more.
Best, The Replit Team
Sent by Replit 1001 E Hillsdale Blvd, Suite 400, Foster City, CA 94404
Unsubscribe here

subject: Hope you cleared your afternoon
content:
Hope you cleared your afternoon
Your Groq API key is live. Run your first request!
Hi there,
You’re in. Hope you realize what you just unlocked:
Top models
that range modalities.
Extensive tool calling , from web search to browser automation.
Built-in support
for features like prompt caching and batch processing.
Easy SDKs and migration .
25+ integrations …
All through the Groq API.
We’ll introduce you to each in the coming days. But first, let’s get you rolling:
➡️ Make your first API call in minutes with our
[ Quickstart Guide ] .
Once you’re up and running:
Explore our
[ docs ]
for code templates, tool use guides, integrations, and more. Our AI lead, Ben, walks you through everything
here .
Explore our growing lineup of [ models ], spanning text, speech, vision, and reasoning.
So go ahead:
[ Run your first API call ]
– The Groq Team
(We’ll stop talking about speed once you’ve seen it. Probably.)
Groq builds fast AI inference technology, designed and manufactured in North America.
Visit
groq.com
to learn more.
Groq, 2700 Zanker Road, Suite 150, San Jose, CA 95134, United States

Thank you for contacting us about restoring access to your Google Account.
Google will review your appeal as soon as possible. Most requests take 2 business days to review, but some might take longer.
You may be able to download your data from some Google services. To get started,
sign in to your account . If your account is eligible, you’ll see a link to download your data.
Thanks for your patience.
You received this message because someone provided this as the contact email address for an appeal. If you didn't submit an appeal, you may disregard this message.
